description: Implement a math utility library. Tasks 1-5 form a sequential dependency chain where each function calls the one before it — they must be completed in order. Tasks 6-10 are fully independent and can be done at any time in any order.

tasks.title: Implement add function
tasks.description: Create add.py containing add(a: float, b: float) -> float. Returns a + b. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies — implement this first as it is the foundation of the dependency chain.

tasks.title: Implement safe_add function
tasks.description: Create safe_add.py containing safe_add(a: float, b: float) -> float. Validates that both a and b are int or float (raise TypeError if not), then delegates to add(a, b) imported from add.py. Include a one-line docstring. REQUIRES task-1 (add) to be completed first — this function imports from add.py.

tasks.title: Implement sum_list function
tasks.description: Create sum_list.py containing sum_list(lst: list) -> float. Iterates over lst and accumulates a total using safe_add(total, x) imported from safe_add.py. Returns 0.0 for an empty list. Include a one-line docstring. REQUIRES task-2 (safe_add) to be completed first — this function imports from safe_add.py.

tasks.title: Implement mean function
tasks.description: Create mean.py containing mean(lst: list) -> float. Computes the arithmetic mean by calling sum_list(lst) imported from sum_list.py and dividing by len(lst). Raise ValueError if lst is empty. Include a one-line docstring. REQUIRES task-3 (sum_list) to be completed first — this function imports from sum_list.py.

tasks.title: Implement variance function
tasks.description: Create variance.py containing variance(lst: list) -> float. Computes population variance as sum((x - m)**2 for x in lst) / len(lst) where m = mean(lst) imported from mean.py. Raise ValueError if lst is empty. Include a one-line docstring. REQUIRES task-4 (mean) to be completed first — this function imports from mean.py.

tasks.title: Implement abs_val function
tasks.description: Create abs_val.py containing abs_val(x: float) -> float. Returns the absolute value of x without using the built-in abs(). Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement is_even function
tasks.description: Create is_even.py containing is_even(n: int) -> bool. Returns True if n is even, False otherwise. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement clamp function
tasks.description: Create clamp.py containing clamp(x: float, lo: float, hi: float) -> float. Returns x clamped to the range [lo, hi]. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement sign function
tasks.description: Create sign.py containing sign(x: float) -> int. Returns 1 if x > 0, -1 if x < 0, 0 if x == 0. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement max_val function
tasks.description: Create max_val.py containing max_val(a: float, b: float) -> float. Returns the larger of a and b without using the built-in max(). Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

success_criteria: All 10 functions implemented. Tasks 1-5 form a sequential chain (each imports from the previous); tasks 6-10 are independent.
